name: nutrient-dws
description: Document processing skills powered by the Nutrient Document Web Services API.

interface.shortDescription: Generate, convert, OCR, redact, sign, and optimize documents via the Nutrient DWS API
interface.longDescription: Process documents with the Nutrient Document Web Services API. Generate PDFs from HTML or URLs, convert Office/images/PDFs, assemble or split packets, OCR scans, extract text/tables/key-value pairs, redact PII, watermark, sign, fill forms, optimize PDFs, and produce compliance outputs like PDF/A or PDF/UA. Requires a NUTRIENT_API_KEY.
